pr.title: content: The All-Apple House — smart home for solo parenting two toddlers
pr.body:
## Summary

Long-form blog post covering the complete Apple HomeKit smart home setup built to support solo parenting two toddlers. First-person technical walkthrough of every device, the monitoring workflow, Siri's reliability problems, and planned upgrades.

**Content includes:**
- Aqara G3 indoor cameras (living room, kitchen, two kids' rooms) with HomeKit Secure Video
- Aqara G5 outdoor cameras mounted on the backyard fence — night vision detail
- Aqara doorbell cameras covering front and side of house
- Apple TV as entertainment + HomeKit hubs with Siri voice control
- Smart plug automations (water fountain, bug zappers on schedules)
- Nighttime monitoring workflow: phone on nightstand with Home app audio
- Device montage: Watch, iPhone, MacBook, Vision Pro all pulling camera feeds
- Honest assessment of Siri reliability as of May 2026 (fails ~90% of the time)
- Planned upgrades: Govee lights, motion sensors, condition-based automations

**Post structure** follows the same conventions as the Vision Pro Steam Link article — `metadata.json` + `page.mdx` with `next/image` imports and CDN image references.

**Images:** 8 pixel art illustrations referenced via Bunny CDN URLs (`https://zackproser.b-cdn.net/images/...`). The images need to be generated and uploaded to Bunny CDN before the post goes live. Generated drafts are available for reference. Image names:
1. `apple-smart-home-hero.webp` — overhead cutaway of smart home at night
2. `apple-home-control-plane-diagram.webp` — Apple devices connected to Home hub
3. `aqara-g3-kids-room-night.webp` — nursery night vision camera view
4. `aqara-g5-fence-night-vision.webp` — backyard split view (dark vs night vision)
5. `apple-devices-camera-montage.webp` — four-panel device grid showing same feed
6. `smart-plug-automation-timeline.webp` — 24-hour automation schedule
7. `siri-error-montage.webp` — comic strip of Siri failing a parent
8. `smart-home-future-upgrades.webp` — blueprint diagram of planned additions

Build passes locally (`npm run build` — zero errors).

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Review prose for accuracy — all device names, model numbers, and capabilities match your actual setup
- [ ] Generate and upload the 8 images to Bunny CDN at the paths referenced in the post (or have Hermes generate them via nano-banana-pro)
- [ ] Generate the OG image: `npm run og:generate-for -- --slug all-apple-smart-home-solo-parent --overwrite` and upload to CDN
- [ ] Verify the post renders correctly on the Vercel preview once images are live
- [ ] Check that the internal link to `/blog/play-steam-link-vision-pro-while-watching-tv` works

### Notes
- The post references CDN image URLs that will 404 until images are uploaded to Bunny CDN. I generated pixel art drafts matching the Vision Pro article style (available on request) but don't have CDN upload credentials.
- Word count is ~3100 words, classifying this as a flagship post (minimum 4 images required by verify-blog-post.sh — the post has 8).
- No banned phrases detected in the content.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/7f15aab0b60c4ed79eae17d5dbfc08be
Requested by: @zackproser
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
